name: James Burgess
subtitle: PADI Master Scuba Diver Trainer
title: Professional Dive Instructor & Underwater Guide
valueProp: I create safe, educational, and transformative underwater experiences. From teaching beginners their first breath underwater to guiding experienced divers through complex technical dives, I combine safety expertise with passion for marine education.
about: I'm a PADI Master Scuba Diver Trainer with over 500 logged dives and 5 years of professional teaching experience. My journey from recreational diver to professional instructor has taken me from the reefs of South Africa to dive sites around the world.

Safety is my top priority. I hold certifications in Emergency First Response, Rescue Diving, and Deep Diving, ensuring every student learns in a controlled, professional environment. My teaching philosophy combines technical excellence with environmental awareness.

I specialize in taking nervous beginners and transforming them into confident divers. Whether it's someone's first time breathing underwater or an experienced diver seeking specialty certifications, I create personalized learning experiences that build competence and confidence.
Beyond teaching, I'm passionate about marine conservation and integrate environmental education into every course. The ocean gave me a career—I'm committed to protecting it for future generations.

mainCert.title: PADI Master Scuba Diver Trainer (MSDT)
mainCert.experience: Open Water, Advanced, Rescue, Deep, Night, Wreck, Nitrox, Conservation

additionalCerts: EFR Instructor • Rescue Diver • Dive Master • AWARE Coral Reef Conservation

experience.title: Master Scuba Diver Trainer
experience.subtitle: Professional Dive Instruction & Marine Education
points: Certified 150+ students from Open Water to Advanced levels
Maintained 100% safety record across all courses and recreational dives
Developed custom training programs for nervous or special-needs students
Led specialty courses including Night Diving, Wreck Diving, and Deep Diving
Integrated marine conservation education into all training programs

experience.title: Dive Master & Underwater Guide
experience.subtitle: Recreational Dive Guiding & Equipment Specialist
points: Guided 300+ recreational dives at local reef and wreck sites
Assisted instructors with Open Water and Advanced courses
Managed dive equipment inventory and maintenance programs
Conducted underwater photography tours and marine life identification sessions
Earned reputation for calm professionalism in challenging conditions

experience.title: Conservation Diver
experience.subtitle: Volunteer Reef Monitoring & Education
points: Participated in coral reef health assessments and data collection
Assisted with fish population surveys and marine species monitoring
Led underwater cleanup dives removing ghost nets and marine debris
Educated recreational divers on responsible diving practices
Contributed dive logs and observations to marine conservation databases

commitment.title: Let's Dive Together
commitment.subtitle: Available for freelance instruction or full-time positions
commitment.text: I'm seeking opportunities to share my passion for diving—whether that's teaching courses at a dive center, leading guided dive trips, or contributing to marine conservation projects. I bring technical expertise, safety consciousness, and genuine enthusiasm for creating memorable underwater experiences.
